headline: Does Faster IPO Inclusion Reshape the Bull Case for Nasdaq’s Index Model (NDAQ)?
summary: Nasdaq recently finalized changes to the Nasdaq‑100 methodology that, from May 1, 2026, allow very large IPOs to enter the index within 15 trading days, following a public consultation completed in February. This faster “fast entry” path could increase attention on blockbuster listings and deepen investor engagement with Nasdaq’s flagship index products. We’ll now examine how Nasdaq’s accelerated inclusion of large IPOs in the Nasdaq‑100 might influence the company’s broader investment...

headline: 2 Profitable Stocks to Keep an Eye On and 1 We Brush Off
summary: While profitability is essential, it doesn’t guarantee long-term success. Some companies that rest on their margins will lose ground as competition intensifies - as Jeff Bezos said, "Your margin is my opportunity".

headline: Stocks plunge, oil surges 10% as Trump vows to hit Iran 'extremely hard'
summary: The president's prime-time address reversed a two-day rally in U.S. stocks that had been driven by optimism over a possible end to the war
